strike.name: Strike
strike.flavor: They hit it. !!There is no other word for what they did.!!

heavy_blow.name: Press
heavy_blow.flavor: All their weight, downward. It ~~breaks~~ holds.

double_strike.name: Thrash
double_strike.flavor: They hit it. Then they hit it again before they ~~thought~~ stopped.

reckless.name: Throw all
reckless.effect: Deal 90 damage. Cost: 15% of max hp.
reckless.flavor: They give it everything. !!Some of what they give is theirs.!!

pyre.name: Kindle
pyre.flavor: They tell it it is warming. **They lie.**

ember.name: Spark
ember.flavor: A small heat. It remembers being [[6]].

inferno.name: Release the heat
inferno.effect: Charge one turn. Release: deal 100 damage.
inferno.flavor: First they fold it inward. Then they let it [[3]].

self_immolate.name: Burn inward
self_immolate.effect: Deal 75 damage. Cost: 25% of max hp.
self_immolate.flavor: They feed it from their own. It eats and ~~gives back~~ !!takes more!!.

cinder_burst.name: Spit ash
cinder_burst.flavor: What is left in their mouth, they give.

smoldering.name: Smolder
smoldering.flavor: The heat comes after, !!slower than the strike!!.

phoenix_dive.name: Fold into fire
phoenix_dive.effect: Deal 55 damage. Heal 50% of damage dealt.
phoenix_dive.flavor: They become heat. !!They drink what they strike.!!

pyroclasm.name: Open the kiln
pyroclasm.effect: Apply Fevering to active and bench enemies.
pyroclasm.flavor: Everything inside it opens at once.

surge.name: Rise
surge.flavor: The water knows where to go.

drench.name: Drown
drench.flavor: The water reaches !!places they did not know it could!!.

maelstrom.name: Circle them
maelstrom.effect: Charge one turn. Release: deal 100 damage. Apply Drained.
maelstrom.flavor: The water remembers where they tried to go.

lifestream.name: Drink the wound
lifestream.effect: Deal 30 damage. Heal 100% of damage dealt.
lifestream.flavor: They take from it what it gave. It is ~~fair~~ familiar.

brine_lance.name: Salt
brine_lance.flavor: The wound takes longer to ~~close~~ forget.

tidal_pull.name: Draw under
tidal_pull.effect: Charge one turn. Release: force opponent to swap.
tidal_pull.flavor: They pull what is here away from itself.

vapor_cloak.name: Step into steam
vapor_cloak.flavor: They are where they were. The other cannot ~~find~~ see it.

glacial_hold.name: Still them
glacial_hold.flavor: The cold holds them in place.

bramble.name: Bind
bramble.effect: Deal 38 damage. Apply Mending to self.
bramble.flavor: The green takes the shape of teeth.

verdant_slash.name: Rake
verdant_slash.flavor: Small hooks. They do not let go.

overgrowth.name: Grow over
overgrowth.effect: Charge one turn. Release: deal 100 damage. Apply Mending to self.
overgrowth.flavor: There is more of them than there should be.

spore_cloud.name: Open the spore
spore_cloud.effect: Apply Mending to self and bench.
spore_cloud.flavor: They release what was held in. The air ~~softens~~ thickens.

photonic_lash.name: Light-lash
photonic_lash.effect: Deal 50 damage. Apply Mending to self.
photonic_lash.flavor: The green carries the brightness. It does not survive it.

strangle_vine.name: Tighten
strangle_vine.effect: Deal 45 damage. Up to +50% damage to wounded targets.
strangle_vine.flavor: The more open the wound, !!the deeper it reaches!!.

healing_wind.name: Let the green pass
healing_wind.flavor: It goes through them. Some stays.

fertile_ground.name: Take root
fertile_ground.flavor: What they are doing is older than they are.

radiance.name: Burn clean
radiance.flavor: The light leaves nothing on them.

sunbeam.name: Shine
sunbeam.flavor: The line lands. They do not look at it directly.

solar_flare.name: Open the bright
solar_flare.effect: Charge one turn. Release: deal 100 damage. Apply Sedated.
solar_flare.flavor: They gather it. Then they are too much of it.

dawn_strike.name: First blow
dawn_strike.flavor: They strike !!before the other has agreed to be here!!.

glowing_mark.name: Name in light
glowing_mark.flavor: The other becomes easier to see. So do the next blows.

beacon.name: Stand bright
beacon.flavor: The others will look at them. They will not mean to. It is **flattering**.

aegis_swap.name: Step into light
aegis_swap.effect: Swap with bench. Incoming ally gains defense +30%. Priority +3.
aegis_swap.flavor: They go behind. Another comes forward, ~~bright~~ warmed.

cleansing_light.name: Wash it
cleansing_light.flavor: What was on them lifts. They feel **clean**.

umbral_slash.name: Open them dark
umbral_slash.flavor: The wound is deeper than the cut.

hex.name: Name it badly
hex.effect: Charge one turn. Release: apply Broken.
hex.flavor: They write the wrong word for it. !!They let it wear it.!!

soulrend.name: Take a piece
soulrend.effect: Deal 75 damage. Cost: 20% of max hp.
soulrend.flavor: They pay in their own. !!It pays in more.!!

shadow_step.name: Step into gap
shadow_step.flavor: They were here. Now they are ~~not~~ behind it.

cursed_bond.name: Tie it to me
cursed_bond.effect: Apply Broken to active and bench enemies.
cursed_bond.flavor: What happens to it ~~happens~~ has happened.

eclipse_slash.name: Blot
eclipse_slash.effect: Deal 50 damage. Apply Broken. +50% damage to Broken targets.

witherer.name: Unmake
witherer.effect: Deal 45 damage. Apply Broken. Apply Drained.

mend.name: Keep
mend.effect: Restore 6% max hp per turn for 4 turns. Priority +1.
mend.flavor: They bind what is open. It ~~closes~~ keeps.

tactical_retreat.name: Step back
tactical_retreat.effect: Swap with bench. Incoming ally heals 30%. Priority +3.
tactical_retreat.flavor: The bench takes the next ~~one~~ blow.

pivot_strike.name: Step through
pivot_strike.effect: Deal 40 damage. Swap with bench. Priority +1.
pivot_strike.flavor: They are where they were not. The blow lands as they leave.

vanguard_call.name: Send forward
vanguard_call.effect: Swap with bench. Incoming ally gains attack +50%. Priority +3.
vanguard_call.flavor: They call the next of them. It does not ask why.

fury.name: Rage forward
fury.effect: Self attack +50%. Cost: 10% of max hp. Priority +1.
fury.flavor: The room narrows. Only what they strike is **real**.

focus.name: Settle
focus.flavor: They sharpen. Nothing else is in the room.

stoic.name: Set
stoic.flavor: They steady. !!The room narrows around them.!!
